name: chatcrystal
description: Turn your AI conversations into searchable knowledge — supports Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Trae, GitHub Copilot

scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.dev:electron: tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "wait-on http://localhost:13721 && cross-env VITE_DEV_URL=http://localhost:13721 electron ."
scripts.build:electron: npm run build && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && electron-builder --win
scripts.pack:electron: npm run build && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && electron-builder --win --dir

author: Rayner Zeng
